common.error_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

homeFeed.title: Popular K-Spots Near You
homeFeed.emptyHint: Try a different category or refresh

landing.subtitle:
Discover Korea like a local
K-content powered travel curation
landing.help_body: Check out what's trending in Korea right now, then tap "Explore K-Vibe" to start discovering spots on the map.

map.title: K-Vibe Map
map.help_body: Search or filter by category, tap a pin or list item for details, and tap the navigation button to use your current location.
map.no_places_hint: Try a different search or category
map.related_attractions_empty: No related attraction data for this area yet

analyze.title: SNS Spot Analyzer
analyze.subtitle: Paste a YouTube or Instagram URL. YouTube uses local mock analysis until AI is approved; Instagram is detected but not analyzed yet.
analyze.help_body: Paste a YouTube link and tap Analyze Spots. We'll list candidate places with a confidence score, so you can view them on the map or build a route.
analyze.input_placeholder: Paste a YouTube or Instagram URL
analyze.invalid_url: This does not look like a supported YouTube URL.
analyze.unsupported_url: Paste a supported YouTube or Instagram URL.
analyze.instagram_pending_body: The app can now detect Instagram links, but live Instagram extraction is held until a no-cost or approved provider path is available.
analyze.loading_estimate: Local analysis usually finishes in a few seconds. Enabled AI workers can take 10-20 seconds on cold start.
analyze.loading_cold_start: If this takes longer, the worker may still be waking up.
analyze.empty_body: Try a travel vlog, MV location clip, or one of the sample URLs above.
analyze.choose_action_hint: Choose what to do with this spot
analyze.local_mode_body: The API returns deterministic mock spot extraction unless an approved AI worker URL is explicitly configured.

persona.title: Build a K-content day plan
persona.help_body: Pick a theme, choose a mood, and set a start time. We'll generate a local preview route with timing for each stop, ready to edit or share.
persona.subtitle: Pick a theme and route mood. This local generator is deterministic while paid AI is approval-gated.
persona.confirm_body: Review your route ingredients before creating the local preview plan.
persona.route_summary_template: {{themeDescription}} Planned as a {{duration}} local preview route.

kpop.label: K-pop Pilgrimage
kpop.description: Agency streets, fan photo spots, music stores, and night views.

bts.label: BTS
bts.description: HYBE, merch streets, and fan-friendly stops.

blackpink.label: BLACKPINK
blackpink.description: Style-led stops with shopping and photos.

drama.label: K-drama Scenes
drama.description: Palaces, alleys, markets, and cinematic walking routes.

palace.label: Palace drama
palace.description: Historic Seoul with classic filming moods.

romance.label: Romance walk
romance.description: Soft scenery, cafes, and evening lights.

night.label: Night episode
night.description: Bridges, towers, and after-dark city shots.

mood.label: Mood Travel
mood.description: Aesthetic Seoul routes tuned for pace, photos, and recovery time.

cafe.label: Cafe day
cafe.description: Cafe streets, design shops, and slower pacing.

photo.label: Photo walk
photo.description: Color, texture, and easy photo stops.

healing.label: Healing
healing.description: Parks, riverside walks, and lower crowd pressure.

foodie.label: Foodie Explorer
foodie.description: Street food, markets, desserts, and late meals in a walkable day.

market.label: Market tasting
market.description: Classic alleys, small bites, and lively stalls.

dessert.label: Dessert hop
dessert.description: Cafes, bakeries, and sweet photo stops.

night_food.label: Night food
night_food.description: Dinner, neon streets, and easy final transit.

local_table.label: Local table
local_table.description: Comfort food, tea, and slower neighborhood pacing.

creator.label: Content Creator
creator.description: Photogenic backdrops, design streets, and short-form-friendly stops.

reels.label: Reels walk
reels.description: Compact spots with quick transitions and texture.

history.label: History Buff
history.description: Palaces, hanok alleys, museums, and heritage-focused walking routes.

palace_day.label: Palace day
palace_day.description: Royal sites, gates, and hanbok-friendly timing.

hanok_walk.label: Hanok walk
hanok_walk.description: Traditional alleys with tea and craft stops.

museum.label: Museum route
museum.description: Indoor culture stops for weather-safe exploring.

heritage_food.label: Heritage food
heritage_food.description: Old Seoul streets with classic market meals.

route.title: My Route
route.help_body: Drag stops to reorder, or use the up/down buttons. Tap a stop's time to set a specific date/time — everything after it recalculates from there.
route.helper: Drag stops to reorder. Tap a stop's time to set it manually.
route.empty_desc: Add spots from the map, SNS analysis, or persona builder to start your route.
route.mini_map_subtitle: Tap a stop number to open it in Google Maps.
route.location_card_body: Check your current distance to {{name}} when you're ready to move.
route.next_stop_far: {{name}} is {{distance}} away. Keep following your route.
route.location_permission_denied: Location permission was denied. You can still use the route manually.
route.location_unsupported: Location is not available in this browser.
route.location_check_error: Current location could not be checked. Try again later.
route.shared_route_invalid: Shared route could not be opened. Showing your saved route instead.
route.clear_route_confirm: This removes every stop in your current route. This can't be undone.

radar.title: Facility Radar
radar.help_body: Drag the radius slider or pick a category, then tap a card or pin to open it in Google Maps.
radar.empty_title: No facilities found in this radius
radar.empty_hint: Increase the radius or try another category.

profile.title: Profile
profile.help_body: Sign in to sync your saved places and routes, or continue as a guest — everything still works on this device either way.
profile.guest_subtitle: Sign in to sync your saved places and routes.
profile.no_saved_places_hint: Open the map, choose a place, and tap the heart.
profile.no_saved_routes_hint: Generate or assemble a route to keep it here.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sync your saved places and routes across devices.
login.switch_to_signup: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.switch_to_login: Already have an account? Log in
login.credentials_error: Request failed. Check your username/password or the backend server.
